changes.reason: Expand the under-sampled call-wall acceptance profile one notch while preserving a large positive DEX requirement; current single trade was very clean but too sparse for inference.
Loosen forward DEX confirmation from 0.05 to 0.03 to admit more accepted-wall continuation attempts without removing the forward-flow concept.
Reduce call-volume expansion requirement from 0.10 to 0.05 so valid wall acceptance with modest but positive flow expansion is sampled.
Require 30 seconds of strike acceptance rather than the fastest 20-second acceptance; this offsets the looser DEX/volume gates with a time-confirmation check.

expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long sample size from the current 1 trade while keeping it option-confirmed and VALID_0DTE dependent. Success is at least several new trades with average MAE still far cleaner than pullback/charm tails, no worse total worst MAE, and net profit/growth quality retained versus run_001. Main tradeoff is admitting duplicate or weaker wall-continuation entries if DEX expansion is too permissive.
label: call-wall-sample-expansion
rationale: The latest 1DTE tightening branch hurt score, profit, drawdown, and worst MAE, so the next experiment should not repeat 1DTE quality tightening or fallback pruning. call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored, produced the cleanest profile-level MAE (-11.7) and highest valid-0DTE efficiency on its one trade, and can be expanded with one coherent option-flow/wall-acceptance family rather than global veto tightening.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long had 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, 12 minute hold, and -11.7 worst MAE. It is too small to promote but materially cleaner than the current tail-heavy 1DTE and charm-pin profiles.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Expansion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Single-trade evidence may be luck; loosening flow gates could add noisy continuation entries or displace better pullback/squeeze trades.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE state with accepted call-wall/strike context, positive forward DEX, and call-volume expansion that is present but below the prior stricter threshold.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE below -60, no worsening of total worst MAE, total net profit >= 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The observed regime is a favorable long-only grind/upside acceptance environment with 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, high PSR, and strong fast-winner contribution...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Breakout Companion Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: 1DTE combined PnL/exposure hour improves above 125 while worst 1DTE MAE improves toward <= -375 and total net profit remains >= 98% of run_001.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Fast-Resolution Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >= 90% of charm_pin_pullback_long PnL, reduce profile worst MAE below -400, and keep fast_under_15m trades within -3 of base.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Mean-Reversion Long Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive out-of-sample PnL with average MAE below active-profile median, no increase in worst MAE, and no reduction in baseline active-profile trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Long Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 trades across expanded sample, positive PnL, average MAE better than -75, and no overlap-driven degradation in pullback/charm-pin profiles.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Slow-To-Profit Tail State Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE and exposure hours while keeping realized PnL within 95% of base; especially reduce 60-180 minute tail holds.

next_experiments.config_bias: Undo the spirit of broad 1DTE tightening and test a split or lighter acceptance branch. Bias toward preserving 1DTE winners while isolating only the overbought weak-higher-low l...
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Acceptance Split Recovery
next_experiments.primary_metric: Total score versus run_001, 1DTE worst MAE, 1DTE PnL/exposure hour, total net profit retained >= 98%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Prefer profile-scoped threshold nudges around the existing extended-VWAP-rejection signature over global gates. Use the failed-threshold evidence, but avoid changing every bound...
next_experiments.name: Surgical Extended-VWAP Rejection Boundary Study
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE improvement with retained PnL >= 95%, protected fast-winner count loss <= 3, and no drop in PnL/exposure hour below 190 on base comparison.

next_experiments.config_bias: Run an activation-style dormant concept probe with minimal routing addition and conservative profile defaults. Treat as discovery, not score maximization.
next_experiments.name: Dormant VALID_0DTE Concept Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: New-profile trade count, standalone PnL, average MAE, overlap impact on pullback_long/charm_pin_pullback_long, and total score drawdown.

next_experiments.config_bias: Expand only one under-sampled high-efficiency profile at a time. Favor slightly broader acceptance around wall confirmation rather than lowering all quality controls.
next_experiments.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Expansion
next_experiments.primary_metric: At least 5 trades, positive PnL, average MAE below -60, no increase in total worst MAE, and no material pullback/charm trade displacement.

next_experiments.config_bias: Hold fallback profiles close to base and study only reporting/routing splits, not tighter thresholds. No more fallback pruning until stale/missing sample grows.
next_experiments.name: Fallback Freeze With Data-State Monitoring
next_experiments.primary_metric: Total score, stale/expired trade count, fallback PnL, fallback average MAE, and whether any new stale tail emerges.
